name: Mayenne (France)
description: A blue field within a red border, divided down the centre by a wavy white pale strewn with black ermine spots; over all a yellow lion at the hoist and two yellow fleurs-de-lis flanking the lower part of the pale.
history: The flag blends emblems of Maine, Anjou and Brittany (the ermine), provinces over which the department spreads.

features.role: blue field with wavy ermine pale, lion and fleurs-de-lis
